# terrible_community_general_scaleway_sshkey (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `ssh_pub_key` (String) The public SSH key as a string to add.

### Optional

- `api_url` (String) Scaleway API URL.
- `state` (String) Indicate desired state of the SSH key.

### Read-Only

- `data` (String) This is only present when `state=present`.
